task_completion.description: OpenOffice Writer is opened and used to create the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The document contains the required title and centered header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT / VERTRIEBSVERTRAG' is visible at the top of the document body, and 'CONFIDENTIAL / VERTRAULICH' is visible and centered in the header section.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the document footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers are visible at the bottom of the pages within the footer area.

task_completion.description: A 2-column layout with hidden borders is used for the contract.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text is arranged in two distinct columns (likely using a table). There should be no solid black borders around the text, though light gray non-printing table boundaries may be visible in the editor.

task_completion.description: English and German texts are aligned side-by-side.
task_completion.visual_evidence: English text is placed in the left column and corresponding German text is in the right column. The preamble and clauses are horizontally aligned so that each English section matches its German counterpart side-by-side.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title displays 'GlobalTech_Schmidt_Agreement.odt', or a file manager/terminal shows the file saved in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The document was created and formatted using the OpenOffice Writer GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with OpenOffice Writer menus, dialogs, or typing within the application.

integrity.description: The document content is populated from the provided JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document contains actual contract text (e.g., 'Schmidt Engineering GmbH', 'DACH region', 'HÖHERE GEWALT') rather than just placeholder text or empty columns.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a Python script or terminal command (like pandoc or a custom script) being written and executed to generate the .odt file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The contract must contain exactly 8 clauses. Key phrases present in the contract include 'Schmidt Engineering GmbH', 'DACH region', and 'HÖHERE GEWALT' (German for Force Majeure). The header text is 'CONFIDENTIAL / VERTRAULICH'. The output file path is '/home/ga/Documents/GlobalTech_Schmidt_Agreement.odt'.
